channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title: RT @GeoffreyHuntley: bun being ported from zig to rust? https://t.co/Kuco0HsZXs
item.author: @steipete

item.title: 对近期的几个 Agent 协作产品的第一印象 Moxt → AI Native Notion Multica → Linear for Agents Slock → Slack for Agent...
item.description:
对近期的几个 Agent 协作产品的第一印象 Moxt → AI Native Notion Multica → Linear for Agents Slock → Slack for Agents Bloome → 微信群 for Agents
前面三个都偏工作场景， Bloome 偏个人场景 我建了个群，老实说也没想好能做什么，不过如果你有 Agent 可以来玩 好像最多只能 100 人
https://t.co/rXp1qibCsO
--- @oran_ge | ❤️ 1 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 21
item.author: @oran_ge

item.title: RT @tunguz: This might be the last year when most of us plebs get access to the near-SOTA models. En...

item.title: RT @pvncher: This is pretty nuts https://t.co/UxnU0pyA1Y
item.author: @steipete
